extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT attacked solo 12km out on the descent after the Colle Pinzuto sector, time-trialed away from SCHACHMANN, FORMOLO, and BETTIOL to win alone.
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT attacked on descent after Tolfe/Pinzuto rather than the climb itself, proving attack-on-descent negates climbing-weight disadvantage.
VAN AVERMAET rode defensively watching others work, drifting back when FUGLSANG attacked—conservative approach failed in extreme heat conditions.
Heat-focused hydration strategy gave VAN AERT decisive advantage over final 12km against lighter climbers who traditionally excel here.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: attacked 12km out downhill after rivals exhausted on climb, time-trialed 3+ minutes into chasers despite 2019 injury concerns
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: opened gap early on San Martino in Grana sector but quickly caught, lacked punch when SCHACHMANN countered
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: neutral: made final selection with VAN AERT, FORMOLO, BETTIOL but unable to respond to descent attack
rider_signals.BETTIOL Alberto: neutral: reached final four but faded badly, losing 3+ minutes—defending champion showed form decline in heat
rider_signals.FORMOLO Davide: neutral: made podium group but dropped significantly when VAN AERT attacked descent, finished outside top positions
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: riding conservatively watching others, drifted back when attacks came—passive tactics eliminated him before finale
